channel.title: INmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: United's new MileagePlus reality: Cardholders win, others lose ground
item.description: United Airlines shook up its loyalty program this week with new incentives for credit cardholders, and hurdles for those who don't carry a card.

item.title: I booked a luxury staycation — and somehow came out $1 ahead
item.description: I booked a luxury staycation with American Express Fine Hotels + Resorts for less cash. Here's how I searched for a hotel and used my Amex Platinum's ...

item.title: The 13 best places to travel solo in 2026
item.description: From Thailand to Chile to New Zealand, here are 13 incredible places to travel solo.

item.title: Newborn Giraffe With Distinctive Hair-do is Charming Visitors to Ohio Zoo–And They Gave Him the Perfect Name

item.title: India’s Sarvam launches Indus AI chat app as competition heats up

item.title: Best Budget Monitors: I Found 3 Impressive Screens Under $200 (2026)
item.description: You might assume all monitors under $200 are terrible. But after trying some out, I found a few that defy expectations.

item.title: Souvenirs From the 2026 Winter Olympics Are Being Resold for Big Bucks Online
item.description: From pins to mascots to Swatch watches, memorabilia from the Milano Cortina Games is showing up on sites like eBay and Vinted.

item.title: OpenAI debated calling police about suspected Canadian shooter’s chats
item.description: Jesse Van Rootselaar's descriptions of gun violence were flagged by tools that monitor ChatGPT for misuse.

item.title: 6 Best Phones With Headphone Jacks (2026), Tested and Reviewed
